pi_items.source: Confirmed via export_result.sh which extracts results from this path, and the task description.
Confirmed via setup_task.sh which restores the project to this specific directory.
Confirmed via setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which execute the Muncie Plan 04 simulation to output this file.
Confirmed via the explicit instructions in task.json description stating conservation_acceptable requires error < 5.0%.
Analyzing the actual Muncie.p04.hdf file output shows an inflow volume of 1.59e9 ft^3, which correctly exceeds this baseline threshold.
Analyzing the actual Muncie.p04.hdf file output shows a true mass balance error of ~8.7%, correctly falling under this upper bound threshold.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the standard Muncie HEC-RAS example model located at /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_projects/Muncie. Running the unsteady simulation (Plan 04) produces Muncie.p04.hdf. The true calculated upstream inflow volume is approximately 1.59e9 ft^3 and downstream outflow volume is 1.45e9 ft^3 (with peak flows ~21,000 cfs). The expected mass balance error is roughly 8.7%, so using an expected_error_threshold of 5.0% will correctly evaluate 'conservation_acceptable' to false. Findings must be written to /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/volume_conservation.json.
